q1.question: What happens if the campaign goal is not reached?
q1.answer: If the goal of opening the coworking space is not reached, we commit to refund the full donated amount. Refunds will be made using the same method as the donation  within a reasonable time from the official communication that the goal has not been met.

q2.question: How does the donation-to-coworking-months ratio work?
q2.answer: Every 100 euros donated entitle you to one month of coworking access, subject to availability. Amounts under 100 euros do not entitle you to one month or fractions of a month.

q3.question: What happens if there is no availability when the venue opens?
q3.answer: If when we open there is no availability for the months you are entitled to based on your donation, the corresponding amount will be refunded to you using the same method as the donation.

q4.question: Do donations under 100€ entitle you to months or fractions of a month?
q4.answer: No. Only donations of at least 100 euros entitle you to one month of coworking (subject to availability). Lower amounts do not entitle you to one month or fractions of a month.

about.title: The association
about.description: ARTCORE is a Social Promotion Association (Associazione di Promozione Sociale) promoting coworking, live music, festivals and cultural exchange. A place where creativity and work meet.

project.title: The coworking journey
project.paragraph1: We plan to fund the association's activities in the long run through coworking and grants. Right now, everyone's support is essential to get started with a venue that can host coworking and small events (home concerts, book presentations, networking).
project.paragraph2: Those who support us with an early adopter subscription are helping with initial expenses; when the venue is ready they get 6 months of coworking access.
project.paragraph3: There is no profit — only the desire that whoever uses these spaces, whether local or just passing through, finds a richer and more relevant cultural offering.
project.expandHint: Click to see how you can participate
project.interestedDesc: Want to stay updated or join the community?
project.canHelpDesc: Skills, time, contacts or ideas: every contribution counts.
project.earlyAdopterDesc: 80€/month for six months. Those who support us now will get 6 months of coworking access when the venue is ready.
project.earlyAdopterBenefit: When the venue is ready: 6 months of coworking access.
project.termsModalRefund: If the goal of opening the coworking space is not reached, we commit to refund the full donated amount. Refunds will be made using the same method as the donation  within a reasonable time from the official communication that the goal has not been met.

hero.title: About us
hero.subtitle: An APS for coworking, music and culture

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: We promote coworking spaces, live music, festivals and international cultural exchange. We believe in inclusive communities where art, work and connection merge.

hero.title: Coworking
hero.subtitle: Shared workspaces for creatives and professionals

hero.title: The space
hero.subtitle: How we imagine it will be

theSpace.intro: A space that breathes with those who inhabit it. From the first coffee in the morning to the last note at night.

morning.title: Morning
morning.body: Light pours in through the windows. Someone opens a laptop, someone makes coffee. The space wakes gently: workstations, shared silence, focus. Here work has a human rhythm.

day.title: Daytime
day.body: Informal encounters, exchanges of ideas, a call in a room, a break in the courtyard. Real coworking: not just desks, but people crossing paths and projects.

evening.title: Evening
evening.body: The work lights go off and the spotlights come on. The same space transforms: a stage for a home concert, chairs in a circle for a book launch, networking with a drink in hand. Culture takes the place of work—not replacing it, completing it.

night.title: Night
night.body: The last applause, the last conversations. The space grows quiet. Tomorrow it will begin again: same place, different stories. A place that isn't just where you work or listen to music—it's where you meet something bigger.

theSpace.outro: This is the space we're building. For those who live here and for those passing through. For the day and for the evening.
theSpace.earlyAdopterIntro: Want to help us get this space off the ground? With an early adopter subscription you contribute to the initial costs and, when the venue is ready, you'll get 6 months of coworking access.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how ARTCORE HUB uses cookies.
cookiePolicy.whatDesc: Cookies are small text files saved on your device when you visit the site.
cookiePolicy.analytics: Analytics cookies: for statistics and site improvement.
cookiePolicy.marketing: Marketing cookies: for advertising and personalized content.
cookiePolicy.functional: Functional cookies: for preferences and features.
cookiePolicy.manage: You can manage preferences via the cookie banner.

gdpr.title: Privacy Policy (GDPR)
gdpr.intro: Information on the processing of personal data under GDPR.
gdpr.controllerDesc: ARTCORE HUB is the data controller for data collected through this site.
gdpr.dataDesc: We only collect necessary data (name, email, message) when you contact us.
gdpr.purposeDesc: Data is used to respond to requests and for association communications.
gdpr.rightsDesc: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure and data portability. Contact us to exercise them.
